use_cases: Display estimated delivery date on e-commerce product and checkout pages
Show shipping timeframe promises to customers during purchase flow
Present delivery promises on order tracking and confirmation interfaces
Indicate estimated arrival on logistics and shipping dashboards
Show time-sensitive delivery windows on retail websites
ai_summary: A delivery estimation badge component with expandable details featuring glass-morphism styling and shimmer overlay effects. The interactive component uses click-to-reveal mechanics to toggle additional delivery information, making it ideal for e-commerce checkout flows, order tracking pages, and product detail interfaces where clear delivery time communication drives conversion.
